title: Obvious-Recipes
description: Obvious Recipes is a Minecraft Forge Mod for 1.12.2 which implements crafting and smelting recipes that Mojang should have added themselves. They just make sense.
body: Obvious-Recipes adds a couple of recipes that just make sense. For example, 1 Nether Wart Block becomes 9 Nether Warts in crafting. Check the Gallery for the crafting recipes. Crafting Recipes: - Enchanted Golden Apple is crafted with 8 Gold Ingots - Normal Golden Apple is crafted with 8 Gold Nuggets - Leather Armor (if it is undamaged) becomes the respective number of leather pieces - Wooden Tools become 2 sticks when put into the crafting grid - 1 Wool becomes 4 String - 8 Cobwebs with 8 string and a spider eye - Iron Horse Armor with 6 Iron Ingots and a Saddle - Mob Spawner with 6 Iron Bars and 1 Egg - Nametag with 2 Leather, 1 Iron Nugget and a Feather - A Saddle with 8 Leather and a Lead - Totem of Undying with 3 Healing Potions, 1 Golden Helmet and 1 Gold Block Smelting Recipes: - Rotten Flesh can be smelted in a Furnace to make Leather - Iron Horse Armor gives 1 Iron Ingot - Gold Horse Armor gives 1 Gold Ingot - A Cauldron gives 7 Iron Ingots - An Iron Door gives 6 Iron Ingots - A Iron Trapdoor gives 6 Iron Ingots too - Iron Bars give 5 Iron Ingots - Buckets give 3 Iron Ingots - Iron Pressure Plates gives 2 Iron Ingots - Gold Pressure Plate gives 2 Gold Ingots Planned recipes: - Gold and Diamond Horse Armor (not working currently because of a bug) Feel free to use it in a modpack or on a server, also if you want to use it in multiplayer it needs to be installed on the server and on the client. Let me know if I should add other recipes either by posting a GitHub Issue or here on modrinth.
